a:r.a:t: I can influence the outcomes that my performance is measured and paid on.
The metrics in my plan align with the organization’s sales strategy.
My assigned rotation gives me a fair opportunity to perform well.
I am selling high quality products that allow me to be successful.
I am provided the resources and support to perform at a high level.
I receive adequate training to perform my job at a high level.
The leads I receive are high quality.
I have the technology and tools I need to perform my job effectively.
I am proud to work in the vacation ownership industry.
I am proud to work at HGV.
I believe HGV is the premier company in the vacation ownership industry.
